post.subject: SUN!
post.body: Today was a fuckin beautiful day! Shortly after i got home from school i went into town and took some snap-shots of things shitty city on one of the rare occasions that it gets lots of sun and heat. I took a walk around the Lagan Look-out, the Waterfront, then to Botanic Gardens. Heres what i saw: This is of the big fish by the Lagan: This is a pic of the Lagan from the Waterfront: Heres a pic of the Waterfront Hall This one is of lots of people sitting at Botanic Gardens: Finally, I managed to really make the Ormeau Bridge look good! (It was tricky)
